trigger: User request: DO a full exploration of any possible thing you can think of to fix multiplayer issues, simultaneous runs, all multiplayer game modes, and each time give a clear description in the issue leaderboard. Other agents running in parallel; avoid overlap.

scope.explicitlyOutOfScope: Already-audited issues in MP-STEAM-AUDIT-2026-04-22, MP-STEAM-20260422-COOP, MP-STEAM-20260422-ULTRATHINK, MP-20260413-003941, MP-20260421-002450 — see CLAIM.md

issues.title: Cross-lobby envelope guard never armed — setActiveLobby not called from joinLobby/createLobby
issues.evidence: src/services/multiplayerTransport.ts:244 documents 'Lobby services SHOULD call transport.setActiveLobby(lobbyId)' but grep reveals no calls from multiplayerLobbyService.ts join/create paths. Only called at :1337 in reestablishSteamP2PSession (app restart path). All three transports (WebSocket :375, SteamP2P :970, BroadcastChannel :1229) implement the guard at lines 445, 769, 1165 respectively, but activeLobbyId remains null for normal joins.
issues.impact: Stale messages from a prior lobby pass through the envelope filter unchecked since activeLobbyId is never set. Player A accepts invite to lobby B while still receiving messages from just-abandoned lobby A. Messages with mismatched lobbyId are not dropped as designed.
issues.fix: In createLobby() after setupMessageHandlers() at :536, call transport.setActiveLobby(_currentLobby.lobbyId). Same in joinLobby() at :686 and joinLobbyById(). Clear with transport.setActiveLobby(null) in leaveLobby() at :900.

issues.title: destroyCoopSync does not clear _preInitBroadcastBuffer — deferred broadcasts leak to next run
issues.evidence: src/services/multiplayerCoopSync.ts:181 (declare buffer), :192-203 (_flushPreInitBroadcastBuffer), :391-423 (destroyCoopSync) — buffer is NOT reset. State vars cleared at lines 411-419 but _preInitBroadcastBuffer is omitted.
issues.impact: If a guest's encounter starts before initCoopSync runs in run N, broadcast queued at :184-189 persists. On run N+1, broadcastPartnerState/broadcastSharedEnemyState before initCoopSync re-enqueues. On initCoopSync, _flushPreInitBroadcastBuffer replays the stale broadcast — partner sees ghosted enemy HP from the previous run.
issues.fix: Add _preInitBroadcastBuffer = [] after line 419 in destroyCoopSync().

issues.title: Subscriber sets never cleared on destroyCoopSync — accumulate across runs
issues.evidence: src/services/multiplayerCoopSync.ts:123, 129, 135, 216 (four subscriber Sets declared), :420-422 (comment admits they are NOT cleared), destroyCoopSync :391-423 (no cleanup of subscriber sets).
issues.impact: Each run, CardApp.svelte registers onPartnerStateUpdate etc. Old listeners from run N fire in parallel with new run N+1. Each closure captures stale _localPlayerId, old partner roster, stale scene references.
issues.fix: In destroyCoopSync add: _partnerStateSubs.clear(); _sharedEnemySubs.clear(); _enemyHpSubs.clear(); _partnerUnresponsiveSubs.clear().

issues.title: setupMessageHandlers accumulates duplicate handlers if join called without leaveLobby
issues.evidence: src/services/multiplayerLobbyService.ts:147-150 (docstring admits the bug), :1514 (per-transport guard checks _handlersAttachedTransport === transport). If player calls createLobby → startNewRun → run ends → createLobby again, _activeHandlerCleanups cleared at :896-897 only if leaveLobby cleanup path actually ran.
issues.impact: Each mp:lobby:* message fires every registered handler twice. mp:lobby:ready → increments isReady twice → UI flickers. mp:lobby:start → _fireSubscribers called twice → game init race.
issues.fix: Before setupMessageHandlers() in createLobby/joinLobby/joinLobbyById, unconditionally: for (const fn of _activeHandlerCleanups) fn(); _activeHandlerCleanups = []; _handlersAttached = false; _handlersAttachedTransport = null.

issues.title: SteamP2PTransport.peerId not cleared if leaveLobby skipped — second connect rejects
issues.evidence: src/services/multiplayerTransport.ts:572 (peerId=''), :642 (set on connect), :940 (cleared on disconnect). Single-peer guard at :625-630 rejects second connect while first peer is still bound (PASS1-BUG-5 pattern).
issues.impact: If player joins lobby A then back-navigates to hub without leaveLobby() firing, transport still holds peerId=X and rejects joining lobby B. BroadcastChannel dev mode unaffected; Steam P2P silently fails.
issues.fix: Guarantee leaveLobby → destroyMultiplayerTransport → _transport?.disconnect() on every hub return. Add defensive peerId='' at top of connect().

issues.title: onLobbyUpdate subscriber set accumulates across leaveLobby/joinLobby cycles
issues.evidence: src/services/multiplayerLobbyService.ts:105 (_lobbyUpdateSubscribers Set), :1373-1375 (onLobbyUpdate returns unsub). No forced clear on leaveLobby.
issues.impact: Component that forgets to call unsub persists across join cycles. Next join fires both new AND orphaned old callback → stale state propagation.
issues.fix: In leaveLobby() before _currentLobby = null at :881: _lobbyUpdateSubscribers.clear(); _gameStartSubscribers.clear(); _raceProgressSubscribers.clear(); _raceResultsSubscribers.clear(); _lobbyErrorSubscribers.clear().

issues.title: BroadcastChannelTransport.connect does not close existing channel on rejoin
issues.evidence: src/services/multiplayerTransport.ts:1213-1217 (disconnect clears listeners), :1155-1182 (connect re-assigns this.channel = new BroadcastChannel() WITHOUT closing old one).
issues.impact: In dev/broadcast mode, join → leave → join same lobby code stacks handlers on the new channel while the OLD channel's message listener stays live. Handlers accumulate per rejoin until tab close.
issues.fix: In connect() at :1155 add: if (this.channel) this.channel.close(); before line 1158.

issues.title: CardApp destroyCoopSync cleanup only fires when $effect re-runs — missed on reference mutation
issues.evidence: src/CardApp.svelte:1024-1040 (cleanup in $effect), calls destroyCoopSync() at :1033 only when effect re-runs. Effect tracks lobbies at :990-1000 but reactive reassignment without reference change skips cleanup.
issues.impact: activeRunState changes quickly mid-effect without lobby reference update → prior run's coopSync handlers/barriers/callbacks persist. Partner state broadcasts from run N fire stale subscribers from run N+1.
issues.fix: Move destroyCoopSync into onBeforeUnmount or a reactive effect keyed on primitive values (mode, lobbyId, hostId) not object reference.

issues.title: _reconnectTimers map not defensively cleared on join if stale from prior lobby
issues.evidence: src/services/multiplayerLobbyService.ts:1596-1623 (_reconnectTimers Map), :878-879 (leaveLobby clears them). No guard for double-join without leave.
issues.impact: Join lobby A → call joinLobby without leaveLobby first → _reconnectTimers still holds A's timers. Player from A reconnects, grace timer fires, removes player from _currentLobby (now B). State corruption.
issues.fix: At start of createLobby/joinLobby: for (const t of _reconnectTimers.values()) clearTimeout(t); _reconnectTimers.clear().

issues.title: Race mode 'Play Again' does not clear currentRun — relics/cards/HP leak into next race
issues.evidence: src/CardApp.svelte:2532 — onPlayAgain only clears activeRaceResults and transitions screen; no call into gameFlowController to reset currentRun. Contrast :2534 onReturnToHub (also skipped).
issues.impact: Next race starts with the previous run's relics, acquired cards, and HP values — invalidating score comparison and deckbuilding integrity.
issues.fix: Add resetRaceState() in gameFlowController that clears currentRun, HUD state, opponentProgress, activeRaceResults. Call from onPlayAgain, onReturnToLobby, onReturnToHub.

issues.title: Duel mode reuses RaceResultsScreen — shows Floor/Accuracy for a turn-based shared-enemy mode
issues.evidence: src/CardApp.svelte:2531 — RaceResultsScreen accepts mode='duel' and renders race UI. src/services/multiplayerGameService.ts:429-434 — duel scoring is survivalBonus+damageDealt-damageTaken+correct*50, totally different from race scoring, but rendered through race layout.
issues.impact: Duel results show Floor Reached=0 and irrelevant Accuracy; player can't read their own performance. Signals incomplete mode implementation.
issues.fix: New DuelResultsScreen.svelte with Damage Dealt/Taken, Turns Taken, Cards Played, Quiz Accuracy. Route at render site by mode. Until built, gate duel from using this screen.

issues.title: Trivia Night never renders its own UI — lobby sets mode='trivia_night' but startNewRun transitions to combat screen
issues.evidence: src/CardApp.svelte:963-967 — initTriviaGame gated correctly on lobby.mode === 'trivia_night', but the surrounding flow continues into startNewRun(:972) which transitions to 'combat'. No branch for transitionScreen('triviaRound').
issues.impact: Host selects Trivia Night, lobby displays it, but the actual game that starts is a regular dungeon run with combat/relics/cards. The trivia mode is dead on arrival from the UI perspective.
issues.fix: After initTriviaGame and before startNewRun, if mode==='trivia_night' transitionScreen('triviaRound') and skip startNewRun. Verify TriviaRoundScreen.svelte is wired into the screen router.

issues.title: activeRunMode pinned to 'multiplayer_race' even for coop/duel — extends C-003 beyond the broadcast gate
issues.evidence: src/services/gameFlowController.ts:445-449 — activeRunMode is still set to 'multiplayer_race' for coop/duel contexts despite the C-003 broadcast-gate fix at :1115. Comment acknowledges the gate only covers the broadcast loop, not every downstream check keyed on activeRunMode.
issues.impact: Any downstream logic that switches on activeRunMode sees 'multiplayer_race' for coop/duel, routing them into race-specific paths. Race-progress broadcast gate is patched but other consumers are not.
issues.fix: Switch to per-mode assignment: activeRunMode = mode==='coop'?'multiplayer_coop':mode==='duel'?'multiplayer_duel':'multiplayer_race'. Add exhaustive switch with default error. Extends prior C-003 fix, does not replace it.
issues.note: Extends existing MP-STEAM-AUDIT-2026-04-22 C-003 rather than duplicating it.

issues.title: Study-multi missing activeDeckMode branch — dungeon starts with null pool, quiz returns empty options
issues.evidence: src/CardApp.svelte:919-933 — contentSelection ternary handles study/trivia/custom_deck but has no branch for sel.type === 'study-multi'. activeDeckMode stays at prior state (or null), encounterBridge can't populate fact pool.
issues.impact: Study-multi lobbies start (post BUG 28 start-guard fix) but combat has no facts. All quizzes show broken/empty options. Mode is unplayable.
issues.fix: Add: else if (sel.type==='study-multi') { playerSave.update(s=>s?{...s, activeDeckMode:{type:'study-multi' as const, decks:sel.decks, triviaDomains:sel.triviaDomains}}:s); }. Verify runs before startNewRun at :972.

issues.title: Trivia Night host can stall game forever — no auto-advance after reveal delay
issues.evidence: src/services/triviaNightService.ts:335-338 — hostNextQuestion sets _roundTimer to hostResolveRound() after DEFAULT_TIME_LIMIT+500ms, but nothing advances AFTER resolve. Host must manually call hostNextQuestion; no recovery if host closes the app mid-reveal.
issues.impact: Every round freezes in 'revealing' phase unless host clicks next. Host disconnect leaves guests stranded forever.
issues.fix: In hostResolveRound after REVEAL_DELAY_MS: auto-call hostNextQuestion if rounds remain, else hostEndGame. Mirror quiz-show UX with auto-advance + 'Skip to next' button.

issues.title: Race duration uses local wall-clock — clock skew between peers distorts tie-breaker
issues.evidence: src/services/multiplayerGameService.ts:537-541 — duration = finishedAt - _localStartMs. _localStartMs is local wall-clock on each side.
issues.impact: Guest clock 5s slower computes 5s shorter duration; guest wins tiebreak even if game-time was identical.
issues.fix: Broadcast sharedStartMs on mp:lobby:start and have both clients compute duration against it, OR use turn-count / frame-count as duration proxy.

issues.title: Trivia Night speedBonus clamping order is fragile — defensive but misleading
issues.evidence: src/services/triviaNightService.ts:105-109 — formula (1 - clampedTiming/timeLimitMs) can go negative, only rescued by an outer max(0,…).
issues.impact: Grace-period late submission produces 0 bonus instead of a small bonus; players see 0 and wonder why.
issues.fix: Make clamping explicit: speedBonus = Math.max(0, SPEED_BONUS_MAX * Math.max(0, 1 - clampedTiming/timeLimitMs)) with comment.

issues.title: Race 'Play Again' does not flush pending transport messages — late race-progress broadcast can misroute
issues.evidence: src/CardApp.svelte:2532 — onPlayAgain immediately transitions screens; no pause or queue flush. Old race-progress message in flight lands during cleanup.
issues.impact: On high-latency Steam P2P, next race start can show stale initial opponent progress.
issues.fix: Before transitionScreen('multiplayerMenu'), set _ignoreIncomingMessages=true until new handlers register, or await transport.flush().

issues.title: Duel guest _duelState never initialised — submitDuelTurnAction silently no-ops on guest
issues.evidence: src/CardApp.svelte:956-958 calls initDuel for mode='duel', but initDuel in multiplayerGameService.ts only populates _duelState when isLocalHost. Guest's submitDuelTurnAction guards on _duelState non-null and bails.
issues.impact: Duel guest cannot take turns — all their actions are silently dropped. Host waits forever for guest turns that never submit.
issues.fix: initDuel must populate _duelState on BOTH host and guest (with isHost flag encoded). Verify turn-order resolution uses _duelState.isHost consistently.
issues.note: Downstream of MP-STEAM-AUDIT-2026-04-22 C-002 (orphan _duelState); this is the specific guest-side manifestation.

issues.title: _peerLeftPollInterval timer may persist across coop barrier if setupMessageHandlers fires twice
issues.evidence: src/services/multiplayerLobbyService.ts:1923-1948 — timer registered in createLobby; cleanup only pushed to _activeHandlerCleanups if isTauriPresent(). No guard against double-call with Track-A-004 duplicate-handler scenario.
issues.impact: Host starts game, guest's onGameStart fires and coop barriers begin. _peerLeftPollInterval still running synthesizes ghost mp:lobby:peer_left events mid-encounter, corrupting state or triggering spurious unresponsive warnings.
issues.fix: Clear _peerLeftPollInterval explicitly in leaveLobby() and at top of setupMessageHandlers() — if (_peerLeftPollInterval !== null) clearInterval(_peerLeftPollInterval); _peerLeftPollInterval = null.

issues.title: awaitCoopEnemyReconcile has no retry — single dropped packet desyncs enemy state for rest of encounter
issues.evidence: src/services/multiplayerCoopSync.ts:759-790 — 5s timeout (COOP_RECONCILE_TIMEOUT_MS), rejects on timeout. Game loop polls with no retry. If the message lands outside the delivery window, guest resolves 'cancelled' but host's merged state is live.
issues.impact: Host and guest diverge on enemy HP mid-combat. Guest kills enemy with wrong state; host still sees full HP enemy. Next-turn barrier fires 'partner unresponsive' — soft lock.
issues.fix: Exponential backoff in game loop: on reconcile fail, call cancelCoopTurnEnd(), re-request mp:coop:request_initial_state, wait 1-2s, retry once. Max 2 retries before abort.

issues.title: Barrier 'cancelled' loses cause — timeout/peer-left/transport-close all identical to caller
issues.evidence: src/services/multiplayerCoopSync.ts:480-492, 572-584 — awaitCoopTurnEnd / awaitCoopTurnEndWithDelta resolve literal 'cancelled' for all reasons.
issues.impact: Caller shows 'partner stopped responding' regardless of whether partner left, transport died, or true timeout. Misleads the player.
issues.fix: Return union: 'completed' | 'cancelled_timeout' | 'cancelled_peer_left' | 'cancelled_transport'. Game loop renders cause-specific UX.

issues.title: onPartnerUnresponsive subscribers not reset on initCoopSync — stacked toasts after hub round-trip
issues.evidence: src/CardApp.svelte:1019-1023, 1024-1040 — subscription wired in game-start effect. Track-A-003 already notes subs not cleared; this is the UX-visible sibling: pause → hub → rejoin → same game fires toast twice.
issues.impact: Visual spam and ref errors once old component is unmounted.
issues.fix: Call resetPartnerUnresponsiveSubscribers() in initCoopSync — same pattern as turn-end signal reset.

issues.title: BroadcastChannel transport never emits disconnected when host tab closes — peer_left lags 30s
issues.evidence: src/services/multiplayerTransport.ts:1386-1467 — peer_left only emitted after PEER_PONG_TIMEOUT_MS (30s). transport.isConnected() stays true because BroadcastChannel has no onclose.
issues.impact: Dev-mode/local coop: host closes tab mid-barrier. Guest sits on spinner for 15s barrier then 'unresponsive' banner, even though the real state (host gone) could have been known immediately.
issues.fix: On BroadcastChannel send/port errors emit local mp:lobby:peer_left. Or reduce PEER_PONG_TIMEOUT_MS to 10s for broadcast mode.

issues.title: Ghost onGameStart subscribers after HMR / error-boundary re-mount — double scene transition
issues.evidence: src/services/multiplayerLobbyService.ts:1380-1394 — comment at :1388 acknowledges subs are NOT cleared on leaveLobby. CardApp registers once on mount; HMR re-mount without cleanup stacks closures.
issues.impact: Dev iteration path: HMR recovery fires both old + new onGameStart → scene transitions twice → initCoopSync + initGameMessageHandlers run twice → duplicate message handler subscriptions.
issues.fix: Either clear subs in leaveLobby(), or weak-ref identity dedupe, or guard inside CardApp: if (startFired) return; startFired=true.

issues.title: awaitCoopTurnEnd has no send-health probe — zombie transport burns full 15s before cancel
issues.evidence: src/services/multiplayerCoopSync.ts:440-497 — BARRIER_TIMEOUT_MS=15s hard timer. Disconnect poll at 2s checks transport.isConnected() but not actual send success. Steam P2P zombie session returns isConnected()=true while send silently fails.
issues.impact: Both sides wait the full 15s before realizing the link is dead, then each resolves 'cancelled' independently and ends up on different turns. The coop run desyncs on turn number — fatal to any deterministic state merge.
issues.fix: Active health check: every 5s during barrier, send mp:coop:turn_end_ping. On send failure resolve 'cancelled_transport' immediately. Prefer bidirectional heartbeat.

issues.title: No 'continue alone' path — partner leave during shop/rest/map-choice softlocks the survivor
issues.evidence: src/services/multiplayerCoopSync.ts:1-25 solo-survivor rule covers combat HP=0 only. multiplayerMapSync requires consensus. No handler for 'partner left mid room-choice'.
issues.impact: Survivor is stuck in shop/map with no way forward except abandoning the whole run via settings.
issues.fix: On peer_left during non-combat room, auto-accept remaining player's pending pick OR show 'Partner abandoned — Continue Alone / Retreat to Lobby' modal.

issues.title: No pause-state sync — partner opening settings looks identical to partner disconnecting
issues.evidence: grep found no pause broadcast in multiplayerCoopSync or multiplayer game handlers.
issues.impact: Player 1 opens settings to adjust volume; partner sees nothing. Partner can't tell if P1 dropped or is paused. Barrier may time out mid-adjustment.
issues.fix: Broadcast mp:coop:player_paused / mp:coop:player_resumed on settings open/close. Render 'Partner is adjusting settings' banner while paused. Extend barrier timeout while a peer is paused.

issues.title: _pendingGameMessageCleanup may be called twice if two onGameStart closures fire
issues.evidence: src/CardApp.svelte:950-970, 1035-1036 — cleanup stored in closure. Track-C-006 scenario (ghost subscribers) produces two onGameStart, both call _pendingGameMessageCleanup?.().
issues.impact: Second call unsubscribes from already-unsubscribed listeners; if transport.on cleanup doesn't guard, ref errors appear in console.
issues.fix: Null _pendingGameMessageCleanup inside the cleanup function itself; or guard CardApp onGameStart to fire-once per game session.

issues.title: PEER_PONG_TIMEOUT_MS (30s) and BARRIER_TIMEOUT_MS (15s) are asymmetric — peer_left fires after barrier already cancelled
issues.evidence: src/services/multiplayerTransport.ts:1353-1359 vs src/services/multiplayerCoopSync.ts:68.
issues.impact: Partner silent at T=0. Barrier cancels at T=15s. peer_left fires at T=30s after game loop has moved on, corrupting new-turn state with stale lobby update.
issues.fix: Align: PEER_PONG_TIMEOUT_MS=10s (one missed ping) so peer_left always precedes barrier timeout. Or make barrier timeout subscribe to peer_left event and resolve immediately when it fires.

issues.title: Race mode ELO double-apply — _tryEmitRaceResults can fire twice if opponent finishes shortly after local
issues.evidence: src/services/multiplayerGameService.ts:577-586 — persistLocalMultiplayerRating(newLocal) without idempotency guard. Called at :208, :246, and :991 (opponent finish). Second call has identical condition (_localProgress.isFinished && _opponentProgress.isFinished both true) and re-applies Elo.
issues.impact: Player gains/loses 2× ELO delta in a single race when network timing allows both local and opponent finish to trigger, corrupting leaderboard rating over time. This is a second-order regression around the f5faa69ae fix.
issues.fix: Add let _raceEloApplied = false; reset in initRaceMode(); set true after persistLocalMultiplayerRating at :583; check !_raceEloApplied before the Elo block.

issues.title: Duel mode ELO applied by BOTH host and non-host — single match double-counts
issues.evidence: src/services/multiplayerGameService.ts:906-917 (host-side at isOver) and :1075-1091 (client-side on mp:duel:end). Host calls persistLocalMultiplayerRating at :916 when isOver=true; non-host calls it again at :1090 on mp:duel:end receipt.
issues.impact: In ranked duels, every match corrupts both players' ratings by 2× delta. Competitive integrity destroyed.
issues.fix: Remove non-host Elo block (:1079-1091), or gate it on !isHost && !lobby.isRanked to cover only friendly spectator flow. Host-only application is already documented intent.

issues.title: Race scoring — negative wrongAnswers exploit turns penalty into bonus
issues.evidence: src/services/multiplayerScoring.ts:29-30 — wrongAnswers = factsAnswered - factsCorrect. No clamp. Malicious peer sends factsAnswered=0, factsCorrect=1 → wrongAnswers=-1 → -wrongAnswers*5 = +5 bonus.
issues.impact: Peer can inflate race score by sending inconsistent fact counts.
issues.fix: wrongAnswers = Math.max(0, factsAnswered - factsCorrect). Validate factsAnswered >= factsCorrect on receipt.

issues.title: Workshop vote tiebreak uses non-seeded Math.random — clients disagree on winner
issues.evidence: src/services/multiplayerWorkshopService.ts:408 — const winnerId = winners[Math.floor(Math.random() * winners.length)].
issues.impact: 4-player lobbies with tied votes show different local winners briefly; if host broadcast fails the divergence persists.
issues.fix: Deterministic tiebreak: sort winners lexicographically and pick [0], OR seed RNG from lobby.seed.

issues.title: Workshop deck metadata validation does not reject control characters / ANSI escapes
issues.evidence: src/services/multiplayerWorkshopService.ts:313-320 — checks length + HTML_TAG_PATTERN only.
issues.impact: Malicious peer sends title='My Deck\x00\x1B[31m' to corrupt JSON serialization, logs, or UI rendering on recipients.
issues.fix: Add /[\x00-\x1F\x7F-\x9F]/ rejection.

issues.title: Map node consensus deadlocks on divergent picks — no timeout, no arbiter
issues.evidence: src/services/multiplayerMapSync.ts:94-115 — _checkConsensus only fires when picks are IDENTICAL. A/B picks produce no resolution.
issues.impact: Two coop players click different rooms → run hangs forever waiting for consensus.
issues.fix: 10s consensus timeout defaulting to host's pick (or lexicographically first pick). Show countdown in the UI.

issues.title: ELO gates only on lobby.isRanked — non-competitive modes can be flagged ranked and corrupt rating
issues.evidence: src/services/multiplayerGameService.ts:577, 908, 1081 — if (lobby?.isRanked) with no mode whitelist.
issues.impact: Workshop/trivia_night/friendly accidentally flagged ranked apply ELO, corrupting ladder.
issues.fix: Whitelist: if (lobby?.isRanked && ['race','duel','coop','same_cards'].includes(lobby.mode)). Log + no-op otherwise.

issues.title: Co-op scoring accepts 0-floor completion — exploitable zero-point edge case
issues.evidence: src/services/multiplayerScoring.ts:26 — floorScore = floor * 100. Disconnect-before-floor-1 produces 0 score but is still a valid record.
issues.impact: Minor: abandoned pre-run coops can pollute stats as valid 0-score finishes.
issues.fix: Require floor >= 1 before emitting finish OR explicitly document 0 as abandoned sentinel.

issues.title: Workshop deck pre-flight check — host self-check never sends an ACK; other players time out waiting
issues.evidence: src/services/multiplayerWorkshopService.ts:249-254 (host pre-populates confirmed if hostHasDeck) vs :274-284 (still waits DECK_CHECK_ACK_TIMEOUT_MS=2000ms for all).
issues.impact: UI: if host is the only one missing the deck, counts display wrong for 2s until timeout; does not block start.
issues.fix: Move self-check result to confirmed set BEFORE awaiting others; use separate timeout for non-host acks.
